`вҳ… Insight в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
The `setupFiles` array runs before every test file, making the mock available globally. Since `LocalStorageMock` is a class, each call to `this.store = {}` in `clear()` correctly rebinds the property on the same instance вҖ” which is why the test's `beforeEach(() => localStorage.clear())` properly isolates each test without needing to reinstall the mock.
`в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`

---

**Files changed:**

| File | What & Why |
|------|------------|
| `src/test-setup.ts` | **Created.** Installs a complete `LocalStorageMock` on `globalThis.localStorage`. Implements all Storage interface methods (`getItem`, `setItem`, `removeItem`, `clear`, `key`, `length`). This is the root fix вҖ” the test environment was resolving to a partial/non-functional `localStorage`. |
| `vite.config.ts` | **Added `setupFiles: ['./src/test-setup.ts']`** so Vitest loads the mock before every test file runs. No other changes to existing config. |

The `store.ts` and `store.test.ts` are untouched вҖ” the implementation was correct; only the test environment config was missing.
